headline: 2025 Sees Record Home Equity Withdrawals: $205 Billion Tapped Amid Falling Interest Rates
summary: Homeowners withdrew the most in home equity in three years, as lower HELOC rates drove more borrowing for debt consolidation.

headline: NYSE Content Update: Two-time Olympic Champions Have a Bell Moment on the Trading Floor
summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Access today's NYSE Pre-market update for market insights before trading begins.
